# Chapter 4: Sequences, series, limits  (~80 pp)
- 4.1 Sequences and their behaviour at infinity (12)
- 4.2 Series: geometric, harmonic, alternating (12)
- 4.3 Convergence tests engineers actually use (12)
- 4.4 Power series, Taylor series (15)
- 4.5 Limits: epsilon-delta informally; engineering use (12)
- 4.6 Failure section: divergent series that look convergent (11)
- 4.7 Worked examples: small-angle approximations, perturbation expansions (6)

**Archetype**: scaling, uncertainty. **Project**: derive the standard small-angle approximations and bound the error. **Exercises**: 30.
